/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -march=native -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/skyrmion_sim.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/skyrmion_sim.dir/src/main.cu.o CMakeFiles/skyrmion_sim.dir/src/params.cpp.o CMakeFiles/skyrmion_sim.dir/src/simulation.cu.o CMakeFiles/skyrmion_sim.dir/src/forces.cu.o CMakeFiles/skyrmion_sim.dir/src/integrators.cu.o CMakeFiles/skyrmion_sim.dir/src/io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/skyrmion_sim.dir/src/rng.cu.o -o skyrmion_sim   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/stubs  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcudart.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurand.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnvToolsExt.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
